output_preview: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so unrelated tenants can refresh in parallel; a single global mutex was rejected because it would make different tenants block each other, as shown by auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel (source: session_id=auth_refresh_session, message_id=auth_fact_2).","evidence":{"session_id":"auth_refresh_session","blob_id":"","message_id":"auth_fact_2"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A global mutex around all auth refresh work was rejected because unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing_retry_session/billing_fact_1","markdown_parser_session/docs_fact_1"]}
